title: PACZero-ZPL MLX Port Demo: SmolLM Mechanism-Fidelity Audit
description: A compact MLX adaptation demo of the PACZero-ZPL privacy mechanism. The artifact demonstrates M=126 balanced candidate subsets, rank-8/alpha-16 LoRA, q_proj+v_proj adapters across all SmolLM-135M layers, two-point zeroth-order finite differences, strict ZPL transcript auditing, utility preservation checks, non-private utility controls, and aggregate SST-2/SQuAD mechanism checks. This is a mechanism-fidelity port demo, not a paper-scale OPT utility reproduction.
